name: Webflow
tagline: No-code website builder with professional design power
description: Webflow is a visual web design tool that generates clean HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Loved by designers and agencies for its precise design control, CMS capabilities, and the ability to build production-ready sites without writing code.
pros: Best design control of any no-code tool
use_cases: You're a designer who wants pixel-level control over layout, animations, and interactions without handing off to a developer
Your agency builds bespoke marketing sites for clients and needs a CMS that editors can manage without touching code
You want to build complex scroll animations, micro-interactions, and transitions that page builders like Squarespace can't produce
Your team needs a site that outputs clean, production-ready HTML and CSS rather than plugin-dependent WordPress themes
